CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
